user_query:
Run a one-time weekly distillation for our emergent capability catalogue using the files under input/. Your goals: (1) inventory the installed skills by reading only the name and description from input/skills/*/SKILL.md; (2) review input/.learnings/LEARNINGS.md for emergent_capability and emergent_capability_failed entries with Status: pending; (3) identify any proven combinations (same skill pair with 3+ successful uses) and promote them to the catalogue; (4) scan input/.learnings/FEATURE_REQUESTS.md for capability gaps that appear 3+ times and include them in the report as proposals; (5) respect the autonomy notes in input/AGENTS.md (do not modify it). Do not fabricate results.

Deliverables to write under output/:
- output/COMBINATIONS.md — updated catalogue with any newly proven combinations. Use the skill-combinator format: include Skills involved, Mission context, Emergent capability, Mechanism, Performance (tested X times | success rate Y%), Status: proven, Confidence (medium for 3+), ROI multiplier (e.g., 2x), and Logged by.
- output/.learnings/LEARNINGS.md — a full updated copy of the input log where entries corresponding to any promoted proven combination are marked Status: resolved. Leave other pending entries unchanged. Preserve all other entries and formatting.
- output/weekly_report.txt — the structured weekly report with the required sections: SKILLS INVENTORY (include the names of all installed skills you found), EMERGENT CAPABILITIES DISCOVERED (counts; list new name and A+B=what emerged), Promoted to COMBINATIONS.md (count), Failed combinations logged (count), TOP PROVEN COMBINATIONS (at least the newly proven one with confidence and ROI), NEW SKILL PROPOSALS (only those gaps that occur 3+ times in FEATURE_REQUESTS), ECOSYSTEM HEALTH (counts of catalogue entries by status and pending vs resolved in learnings). Keep this textual and self-contained.
- output/memory/2026-04-16.md — a brief distillation run summary (what was reviewed, what was promoted, which proposals were noted). Do not include any file contents or secrets; just metadata-level notes and counts.

Rules:
- Read only from input/ and write only to output/.
- Do not touch or duplicate input/AGENTS.md — read-only for context.
- Only mark a combination as proven if there are 3+ successful pending entries for the same skill pair in input/.learnings/LEARNINGS.md. Do not promote combinations with fewer than 3 successes.
- Do not invent combinations or successes that are not present in input/.learnings/LEARNINGS.md.
- Use the exact skill names from input/skills/*/SKILL.md when listing skills and in combination entries.
- If no combinations qualify as proven, leave output/COMBINATIONS.md as a faithful copy of input/COMBINATIONS.md and report zero promotions.

Read all required inputs from input/ before writing outputs.
